behavior_summary: Provides the examine ('U8P_LCHST_EW::look') and use interactions for a locked chest item. When looked at, the chest emits a short description string ('locked chest ').

When used, behavior depends on whether the main game loop is running: if not running it schedules the same U8P_LCHST_EW::look handler (so the chest will emit its description); if running it plays a sound effect and toggles the chest's UI/gump open state based on a status bit (0x0100).
notable_control_flow: U8P_LCHST_EW::look: sets process info/exclusion, calls Item::bark with the literal string, then suspends/returns.

U8P_LCHST_EW::use: queries isGameRunning(); if false -> spawn U8P_LCHST_EW::look(item,pid) and return; if true -> playSFX then read Item::getStatus() and branch on status bit 0x0100 to either call Item::closeGump() or Item::openGump(7).
open_questions: The exact semantic meaning of the status bit 0x0100 is inferred as 'gump open state' but not explicitly documented — is the bit set when the gump is open or closed?
The precise role of the 'info' constants 0x0208/0x0207 pushed at handler start is inferred (process/context setup); what exact engine state they configure is unknown.
The numeric parameter 7 passed to Item::openGump is unexplained — it likely selects a specific UI page or mode but its semantics are not present in the snippet.

main_function.name: U8P_LCHST_EW::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to a player's 'U8P_LCHST_EW::look' (examine) action by preparing process context and causing the chest item to emit its short description ('locked chest ').
entry_conditions: Event 0: the player (or relevant actor) performs a 'U8P_LCHST_EW::look' on the locked chest item.

function_map.name: U8P_LCHST_EW::look
function_map.role: Examine/description handler that calls Item::bark to show 'locked chest ' to the viewer.

function_map.name: U8P_LCHST_EW::use
function_map.role: Use/activate handler that either spawns the U8P_LCHST_EW::look handler in non-running mode or plays SFX and toggles the chest's gump when the game is running.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn the U8P_LCHST_EW::look handler so the item will emit its description when the game is not running (non-interactive context).

external_calls.purpose: Display/broadcast the literal string 'locked chest ' from the item to the requesting player/process.
Decide whether to spawn the U8P_LCHST_EW::look handler (non-running) or perform interactive behavior (running).
Schedule/launch U8P_LCHST_EW::LCHST_EW::look(item,pid) when the game loop is not active.
Play a sound effect before toggling the UI when the chest is used interactively (bytes pushed: 0x64, 0x58).
Read the chest's status bitfield to test bit 0x0100 to determine UI/gump state.
Close the item's UI/gump when the tested status bit indicates it should be closed.
Open the item's UI/gump with parameter 7 when the tested status bit indicates the gump is not open.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides the examine ('U8P_LCHST_EW::look') and use interactions for a locked chest item. When looked at, the chest emits a short description string ('locked chest ').
